## Pick #1 — Score: 8/10

**Stacey King, Bulls Champion and Voice of Chicago Basketball, Dead at 59**
*Google News - NBA + 1 more*
[Read the full article →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
**Live Pick:** true

**Why it matters:**
Stacey King won three championships alongside Michael Jordan in the Bulls' dynasty years, but his second act as Chicago's beloved color commentator — famous for his unfiltered enthusiasm and one-liners — made him a cult figure for an entirely new generation of fans. His death at 59 hits the Bulls community especially hard because he was so much more than a broadcaster; he was the emotional connective tissue between the Jordan era and today's team. Losing him while the NBA Finals are actively being played gives this moment a particular weight — the sport is at its biggest stage and one of its most joyful voices is suddenly gone.

**Hook:**
Stacey King — Bulls champion, Chicago's favorite broadcaster, one of the most genuinely entertaining voices in the NBA — died at 59 / Three rings with MJ, then decades making losing seasons bearable for Bulls fans / This one genuinely stings
